user_query: I'm planning a surprise party for my best friend's birthday. Can you generate some random profiles of people who live in New York City? I also need a list of top backlinks for my friend's website 'example.com'. Furthermore, please provide me with the details of the credit card with id 5678.

TaskList.description: Generate random profiles of people living in New York City.
Retrieve the list of top backlinks for the website 'example.com'.
Fetch the details of the credit card with id 5678.
